ksa_text: Monitor AI regulatory developments and assess their implications for the enterprise AI system portfolio, producing compliance gap analyses for impacted systems.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AG-T-009 (AI Governance/Task) excluded as out_of_scope (composite 0.526, highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.526). Domain prior: out. Core hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with out_of_scope classification, composite 0.526, and AI Governance (AG) handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this AI Governance KSA for Data Lineage Analyst?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: AI Governance competencies do not appear as Data Lineage Analyst requirements in job postings. They are allocated to specialist roles. Exclusion consistent with market patterns.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld by market evidence. AI Governance is not a Data Lineage Analyst core competency. Final decision: exclude.
